description: Parts scrapped (e.g. BDE/scrap-capture says 10). Concrete part-lineage label emitted by the discrepancy-engine (types.ts PartLabel:311-316). Inherits provenance + lineage links from ProductionPart; adds scrap_reason (snapshot.ts partObject:87).

attributes.name: scrap_reason
attributes.description: Reason / defect code for the scrap (types.ts ProductionPart.scrap_reason:346)
